pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 11 without explicit dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error or warning: source and target options are deprecated in favor of release in Java 11+ toolchains.
